//: ESLint-only tsconfig. typescript-eslint's project resolver needs every file it lints to belong to a tsconfig that ENUMERATES it (not just match it via an include glob — TS skips .vue files from globs because it doesn't natively compile them). This config spells the renderer + main file sets out together so the .vue + .ts files all resolve. Build pipelines still use tsconfig.main.json / tsconfig.renderer.json; this file is only loaded by ESLint via parserOptions.project.
